headline: The tiniest MMO
summary: PointlessQuest launched with a peak of only 15 concurrent players. This new MMO starkly contrasts with large-scale games like World of Warcraft. The game embraces its small, niche online community.

headline: The Motorola Edge 70 Max is all about power
summary: Motorola unveiled its new flagship, the Edge 70 Max, designed for power-intensive tasks. It boasts a huge battery, rapid wired charging, and support for mobile gaming. This is the first Android phone with full 25W Qi2 wireless charging.

headline: Home Depot’s viral 12-foot skeleton now talks
summary: Home Depot's popular 12-foot Halloween skeleton, Skelly, has received a new upgrade. It now includes technology allowing it to speak. Users can talk through Skelly's moving mouth using a mobile app.

headline: Samsung’s new foldable display is harder to crease and damage
summary: Samsung introduced Flex Titanium, a new durable display technology for foldable phones. The new tech is slimmer, stronger, and less prone to creasing. It will debut in the upcoming Galaxy Z Fold 8.

headline: The Odyssey fans struggle to find IMAX 70mm cinemas as IMAX boss calls new projectors impractical
summary: Fans of Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' are searching for one of 41 global IMAX 70mm cinemas. The film was shot entirely on rare 1570 cameras, requiring specialized projection. The IMAX boss stated building new projectors to meet demand is not practical.

headline: Game of Thrones celebrates 15 years with official British money
summary: Game of Thrones marks its 15th anniversary since its HBO debut. The iconic series captivated audiences worldwide. This milestone is celebrated with the release of official British commemorative money.

headline: New Pokémon GO codes released for July 2026
summary: New Pokémon GO codes are available for July 2026. Players can redeem these codes for various in-game freebies. Rewards include avatar items, Poké Balls, and more useful resources.

headline: Netflix drops retro VHS Stranger Things Season 1 for 10th anniversary
summary: Netflix surprise-launched a retro VHS-inspired version of Stranger Things Season 1. This special release coincides with the show's 10th anniversary. Fans can experience the first season with a nostalgic aesthetic.

headline: Standing ovation for Starmer in the Commons
summary: Keir Starmer received a standing ovation in the House of Commons. The applause came from both his own party and other Members of Parliament. This followed his final answer during a parliamentary session.

headline: Iran threatens trade routes amid new US strikes
summary: Iran threatens to block additional global trade routes. This warning comes as the US launches fresh military strikes. US President Trump vowed further action if Iran refuses to return to talks.

headline: England faces biggest match since 1966, aiming for immortality
summary: England is set to face Argentina in a crucial World Cup semi-final match. This game is hailed as the Three Lions' most significant since 1966. A victory could pave their way to a historic 'immortality'.

headline: Three men jailed for 'predatory' Brighton beach rape
summary: Three men have been sentenced to jail for the rape of a woman on Brighton beach. Jurors described the attack as 'cynical, predatory and callous'. Justice has been served in response to the horrific crime.
